# Picasso Design System

> Picasso is Toptal's React component library implementing the BASE design system.
> This documentation is optimized for LLM consumption.

## Docs

- [Initial Setup](./initial-setup.md): Installation, setup, and getting started
- [Component Index](./components/index.md): Full list of all UI components
- [Tutorial Index](./tutorials/index.md): Step-by-step usage guides

## Components

- [Accordion](./components/accordion.md): Accordions store information behind collapsible sections,
- [Alert](./components/alert.md): Use to alert user about important information
- [Amount](./components/amount.md): Use "Amount" to render formatted amount with a currency, in desired locale.
- [Avatar](./components/avatar.md): Profile photo.
- [Backdrop](./components/backdrop.md)
- [Badge](./components/badge.md): Renders a small badge.
- [Breadcrumbs](./components/breadcrumbs.md): Breadcrumbs component indicates the current page’s location within a navigational hierarchy.
- [Button](./components/button.md): A Button indicates a possible user action.
- [Carousel](./components/carousel.md)
- [Drawer](./components/drawer.md): Allows rendering a sidebar with custom content
- [Dropdown](./components/dropdown.md): Allows rendering of menus and custom content triggered by custom anchors
- [EmptyState](./components/emptystate.md)
- [EnvironmentBanner](./components/environmentbanner.md): Banner on page top to highlight current environment
- [Helpbox](./components/helpbox.md): Container specialized for rendering suggestions
- [Icons](./components/icons.md)
- [Image](./components/image.md): Display any types of images.
- [Indicator](./components/indicator.md)
- [Link](./components/link.md): The Link component allows you to easily customize anchor elements with your theme colors and typography styles.
- [List](./components/list.md)
- [Loader](./components/loader.md): Loaders indicate that an action is underway and that the user must wait to proceed until it is finished.
- [Logo](./components/logo.md): The Toptal logo is the visual representation of the products we create.
- [Menu](./components/menu.md): Menu list.
- [Note](./components/note.md)
- [Notification](./components/notification.md): Notification standard way to notify user about important information
- [OverviewBlock](./components/overviewblock.md): Allows displaying counters.
- [PageHead](./components/pagehead.md)
- [PageHeadBase](./components/pageheadbase.md)
- [PageSidebar](./components/pagesidebar.md): Navigation items provide access to parts in your app
- [PageTopBar](./components/pagetopbar.md): A PageTopBar component
- [Pagination](./components/pagination.md): Component which allows navigating long data lists.
- [Picasso](./components/picasso.md): The wrapper and the root component.
- [ProgressBar](./components/progressbar.md)
- [Quote](./components/quote.md): Use quotes to highlight quoted content.
- [RichText](./components/richtext.md): RichText showcases the output of RichTextEditor.
- [Section](./components/section.md): Use sections to organize content on the page
- [ShowMore](./components/showmore.md): Strips provided content.
- [SkeletonLoader](./components/skeletonloader.md)
- [Slide](./components/slide.md)
- [Slider](./components/slider.md): Slider is used to pick a numeric value from the predefined range
- [StaticTreeView](./components/statictreeview.md): Allows rendering a static variant of tree view
- [Stepper](./components/stepper.md): Stepper component display progress through a sequence of steps.
- [Table](./components/table.md): Display sets of data
- [Tag](./components/tag.md): Tags are used to describe other topics, including textareas,
- [Timeline](./components/timeline.md)
- [TreeView](./components/treeview.md): Allows rendering a tree view
- [Typography](./components/typography.md): Our primary typeface is Proxima Nova, a contemporary font that combines humanist proportions with a geometric appeara...
- [TypographyOverflow](./components/typographyoverflow.md): Show tooltip when typography overflows
- [UserBadge](./components/userbadge.md): Show user avatar and name along with addition content

## Widgets

- [AccountSelect](./components/accountselect.md)
- [ApplicationUpdateNotification](./components/applicationupdatenotification.md)

## Forms

- [Autocomplete](./components/autocomplete.md)
- [AvatarUpload](./components/avatarupload.md): Gets the image from file input and displays it in the Avatar component.
- [Checkbox](./components/checkbox.md)
- [DatePicker](./components/datepicker.md): Date Picker component
- [Dropzone](./components/dropzone.md)
- [FieldRequirements](./components/fieldrequirements.md): Component to list field requirements to be valid
- [FileInput](./components/fileinput.md): Input file control
- [Form](./components/form.md): Helper components for building forms.
- [FormActionsContainer](./components/formactionscontainer.md): Aligns form actions according to chosen form layout (vertical or horizontal).
- [Input](./components/input.md): Input fields are UI elements through which users submit information to the system.
- [MonthSelect](./components/monthselect.md): Month selector
- [NumberInput](./components/numberinput.md): Input component for numbers
- [PasswordInput](./components/passwordinput.md): Input component for passwords
- [Radio](./components/radio.md): Radio buttons are best used when users need to select a single option from a set of unfamiliar choices.
- [Rating](./components/rating.md): Ratings provide a way for users to express their opinion
- [RichTextEditor](./components/richtexteditor.md)
- [Select](./components/select.md): Selects are interactive elements that prompt users to make selections
- [Switch](./components/switch.md): Switches are used to toggle the state of an element on or off.
- [TagSelector](./components/tagselector.md): Input that allows multiselection from a list of available options with autocomplete.
- [TimePicker](./components/timepicker.md): Time Picker component
- [YearSelect](./components/yearselect.md): Year select

## Transitions

- [Collapse](./components/collapse.md)
- [Fade](./components/fade.md)

## Layout

- [Container](./components/container.md): Use Container to add space between 2 elements.
- [Grid](./components/grid.md): The layout element which is providing grid container functionality.
- [Page](./components/page.md): A Page component
- [Paper](./components/paper.md): Elevated container with shadow
- [Tabs](./components/tabs.md): Tabs allow to switch between content sections

## Overlays

- [Modal](./components/modal.md): A modal displays content that temporarily blocks interactions with the main view of a site.
- [PromptModal](./components/promptmodal.md): Predefined modal for short prompts that asks user for input.
- [Tooltip](./components/tooltip.md): Tooltips display informative text when users hover over, focus on, or tap an element

## Utils

- [Breakpoints](./components/breakpoints.md): For optimal user experience, we need to be able to adapt layout
- [Colors](./components/colors.md): The Toptal color palette comprises the core brand colors
- [Formatters](./components/formatters.md): For consistent user experience, we need to standardize formatters.
- [Gradients](./components/gradients.md): Gradients are important visual elements.
- [Shadows](./components/shadows.md)
- [Transitions](./components/transitions.md)

## Picasso Charts

- [AnalyticsChart](./components/analyticschart.md): Use LineChart with analytics data
- [BarChart](./components/barchart.md): Responsive bar charts
- [CategoriesChart](./components/categorieschart.md): Use BarChart with analytics data
- [LineChart](./components/linechart.md): Responsive line charts

## Picasso Forms

- [Form](./components/form.md): Form
- [SubmitButton](./components/submitbutton.md): SubmitButton reacts to the submission state of the form.

## Other

- [Final Form](./components/final-form.md): Final Form

## Picasso Pictograms

- [Pictograms](./components/pictograms.md)

## Picasso Query Builder

- [QueryBuilder](./components/querybuilder.md)

## Tutorials

- [Difference between Picasso Forms and base form components](./tutorials/difference-between-picasso-forms-and-base-form-components.md): Learn how to pick the right abstraction for working with inputs and forms in different scenarios.
- [How to layout a page](./tutorials/how-to-layout-a-page.md): Learn how to create page layouts using Picasso Grid component along with Page and Container components.
- [How to layout forms](./tutorials/how-to-layout-forms.md): Learn how to create form layouts using Picasso Form components.
- [How to optimize for bundle size](./tutorials/how-to-optimize-for-bundle-size.md): Learn how to optimize Picasso usage for bundle size
- [How to use server side rendering](./tutorials/how-to-use-server-side-rendering.md)
- [How to use spacings](./tutorials/how-to-use-spacings.md)
- [Merging classes](./tutorials/merging-classes.md): How to merge classes with respect of Picasso TailwindCSS theme
- [Styled Components](./tutorials/styled-components.md): Tips and tricks for using Picasso components with styled-components
